task_completion.description: Create the conditions file competitors.csv with required columns and at least 4 rows.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A spreadsheet or text editor showing the file 'competitors.csv' with columns 'target_word', 'distractor_word', and 'correct_side', containing at least 4 rows of word pairs.

task_completion.description: Open PsychoPy Builder to create the experiment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The PsychoPy Builder interface is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Add a button component to start each trial, positioned at the bottom-center (y = -0.7).
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Button component properties window in PsychoPy showing the Position (x, y) field with the y-coordinate set to -0.7.

task_completion.description: Configure text components to display the words at the top of the screen.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text component properties in PsychoPy showing text fields using variables (e.g., $target_word, $distractor_word) and positioned at the top of the screen (positive y-coordinate).

task_completion.description: Add a mouse component configured to capture the mouse state every frame.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Mouse component properties window in PsychoPy showing 'Save mouse state' set to 'on every frame'.

task_completion.description: Add a loop to the experiment that utilizes the created conditions file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Loop properties window in PsychoPy showing the 'Conditions' field populated with the path to 'competitors.csv'.

task_completion.description: Save the PsychoPy experiment as mouse_tracking.psyexp in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The PsychoPy window title or a save dialog showing the filename 'mouse_tracking.psyexp' in the '/home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the PsychoPy Builder GUI to create the experiment rather than writing the .psyexp XML/Python file directly via a script.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing interaction with the PsychoPy Builder interface (adding routines, editing component properties).

integrity.description: The agent created the conditions file using a spreadsheet editor or text editor manually.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a text editor (e.g., gedit, nano) or spreadsheet application open with the CSV contents, rather than just executing a pre-written bash/python script to generate it.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply download or echo a complete .psyexp file from an external source.
integrity.visual_evidence: Step-by-step building of the experiment in the PsychoPy GUI is visible across multiple screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm:

- Conditions file path: /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/conditions/competitors.csv
- Required columns in conditions file: target_word, distractor_word, correct_side
- Minimum rows in conditions file: 4
- Start button y-coordinate: -0.7
